title: Behold My Messenger 4 — Behold My Great White Throne
subtitle: Revelation · Judgement

The Descent of THE GREAT WHITE THRONE

THE DESCENT OF THE GREAT WHITE THRONE
THE DEFINITION OF THE ANCIENT OF DAYS
THE DEFINITION OF THE ANCIENT OF DAYS (part 2)
THE DEFINITION OF THE ANCIENT OF DAYS (part 3)
THE CONFIRMATION OF WHO SHEKINAIH IS

ACT 1 SCENE 3 
Crowned Eagles Global Meeting Venue, Singapore

ACT 1 SCENE 4
Level 4 of Hell/ Heaven
WHAT HAPPENS WHEN A MAN DIEs?
Jealousy INTO Generosity of heart in giving to others as unto me
Selfishness INTO Think on behalf of others
Spitefulness INTO Be happy for others, Peaceable fruit of Righteousness.
Be Discreet with Our secret when I whisper to your ear
Honor one another and communicate with love
Be respectful to me in honoring my servant which I had appointed over you.
Attitude of the heart to one another as unto me
Do Our will as commanded by us through Shekinaih and those I put above you
How THE ELOHIM's Ministers will be judged
B) Cowards: not inherit THE Kingdom of Heaven
C) Judgmental Attitude WILL BE Judged heavily by THE ELOHIM
E) Measured by the words THEY spoke
F) Listen to my Word and Practice it EQUAL Walk it out
G) Whether they Obey Our Will
G) Whether they Obey Our Will (part 2)
A) Whether they obey my will
B) Whether they love one another as I have loved you
C) Whether they hurt others with their words, EXCEPT WHEN I AM USING IT IN THIS AREA TO TEST OTHERS (SHEKINAIH, EXCEPTIONAL)
D) Whether they submit to the authorities I have placed over them that obey me
E) Whether they walk OUT THEIR Love AND MY WILL FOR THEM
F) Whether they are walking in obedience of faith
G) Whether they walk in LIBERTY, IN mercy, DO NOT JUDGE
H) Whether they are in intimacy with me, HOW MUCH THEY KNOW ME

Few are Chosen

B) HARASS NOT WHEN OTHERS ARE BLESSED

8) BE NOT ANGRY AND SIN NOT, CONTROL YOUR TONGUE
10) DIFFERENT CATEGORIES OF PEOPLE JUDGED DIFFERENTLY
12) MY ELECT MUST BE CIRCUMCISED TO RECEIVE BOTH OF YOU, WHO REPRESENT THE TRINITY

Level 1, Gehenna/Tartarus

6) Sorcerers, Satanist, Witches and False Ministers

8) Those Who Persecute and Trouble Our True Ministers and Little Ones

3) Against My Instruction in the Scripture
